specific_question: What percentage of Elexion Automotive's newly approved 2026 budget will be allotted to the cybersecurity team, and how does this differ from 2025?
answer: Elexion Automotive has approved its 2026 budget to include a 4% allocation to the cybersecurity team. This represents an increase from 2025's budget, which afforded just 2% of the budget to the cybersecurity team.
dr_question: In response to the April 2025 Help Net Security article, how well is Elexion Automotive poised to adapt and take proactive measures to prevent itself and its consumer base from the latest cybersecurity threats as we approach 2026?
